items.title: Canada police investigate reports of shots fired at US consulate in Toronto
items.dek: It comes as Norwegian police investigate an explosion that occurred outside the US embassy in Oslo on Sunday.
items.body: It comes as Norwegian police investigate an explosion that occurred outside the US embassy in Oslo on Sunday.

items.title: Lebanon calls for talks with Israel on plan to end Hezbollah conflict
items.dek: President Aoun outlines a path towards "permanent security and stability", as Israeli strikes targeting Hezbollah continue.
items.body: President Aoun outlines a path towards "permanent security and stability", as Israeli strikes targeting Hezbollah continue.
